zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Weyland於1334年出生在英國素福爾可哈爾斯費爾德時，她的父親Robert de Weyland35歲，母親Cecily de Baldock22歲。她和John Botetourt至少有1個女兒。她去世於1377年之後在英國素福爾可門德萊善姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Weyland于1334年出生在英国素福爾可哈爾斯費爾德时，她的父亲Robert de Weyland35岁，母亲Cecily de Baldock22岁。她和John Botetourt至少有1个女儿。她去世于1377年之后在英国素福爾可門德萊善姆。

nameMeanings.name: Weyland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt.

variants.name: Wieland
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Otto, Heinz, Dieter, Dietrich, Erdmann, Florian, Franz, Fritz, Gerhard.

German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wīg ‘war’ + land ‘land, territory’. This name was borne by the supernaturally skilled smith of ancient Germanic folk legend, and for this reason it may in part have been given as a nickname to blacksmiths.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): presumably an adoption of the German surname.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Weyland was born in 1334, in Charsfield, Suffolk, England, her father, Robert de Weyland, was 35 and her mother, Cecily de Baldock, was 22. She had at least 1 daughter with John Botetourt. She died after 1377, in Mendlesham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Weyland est née en 1334, à Charsfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Weyland, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Baldock, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec John Botetourt. Elle est décédée après 1377, à Mendlesham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Weyland 1334 in Charsfield, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Weyland 35 und ihre Mutter Cecily de Baldock 22. Sie hatte mit John Botetourt mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1377 in Mendlesham, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Weyland è nata il nel 1334 nel Charsfield, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Robert de Weyland, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Cecily de Baldock, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con John Botetourt. Morì dopo il 1377, nel Mendlesham, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Weylandが1334年にイギリススフォルクチャースフィールドで生まれた時，父Robert de Weylandは35歳，母Cecily de Baldockは22歳であった。彼女はJohn Botetourtとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1377年以後にイギリススフォルクメンドレシャムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Weyland(이)가 1334년 영국 수폴크 처스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Weyland(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily de Baldock(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 John Botetourt(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1377년 이후 영국 수폴크 멘들레샤에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Weyland nasceu em 1334, em Charsfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Weyland, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Baldock, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com John Botetourt. Ela faleceu após 1377, em Mendlesham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Weyland родилась в 1334 г. в местности чарсфиелд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Weyland было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Baldock, 22. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от John Botetourt. Она умерла после 1377 г. в местности мендлешам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Weyland nació en 1334, en Charsfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Weyland, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Cecily de Baldock, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con John Botetourt. Murió después de 1377, en Mendlesham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
